data.content:
The implementation is complete and verified. Here's the summary:

**Project structure:**
```
TicketClassifier/
├── Models/TicketData.cs        # ML.NET data model + prediction class
├── Models/TicketRequest.cs     # API DTOs (request/response/metrics)
├── Services/TicketClassifierService.cs  # ML pipeline: train + predict
├── Controllers/TicketsController.cs     # API endpoints
├── Data/tickets.csv            # Training data
├── Program.cs                  # DI registration
└── TicketClassifier.csproj     # ML.NET 4.0.2 dependency
```

**Endpoints:**
| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/tickets/train` | Trains the SDCA Maximum Entropy model, returns evaluation metrics |
| POST | `/api/tickets/predict` | Predicts category with confidence scores |

**ML Pipeline:** Text featurization (Subject + Description) → concatenate with Priority → normalize → SDCA Maximum Entropy multiclass classifier.

The prediction correctly classified "I was double charged on my credit card" as **Billing** with 88.9% confidence.
